title: Authentic Chicken Biryani
description: Aromatic layered rice dish with premium spices
descriptionMr: प्रीमियम मसाल्यांसह सुगंधी थरांचा तांदळाचा पदार्थ
steps: Marinate chicken with spices for 2 hours
Cook rice with saffron and whole spices
Layer rice and chicken in a pot
Cook on low flame for 30 minutes

title: Classic Dal Tadka
description: Comforting lentils tempered with aromatic spices
steps: Prepare tadka with ghee, cumin, garlic
Add tomatoes and spices, cook until oil separates
Mix dal and tadka, garnish with coriander
